name: Unchained Soul of Anguish
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アルバ
desc:
2+ monsters, including an "Unchained Soul" monster
You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; immediately after this effect resolves, Link Summon 1 DARK Link Monster, except "Unchained Soul of Anguish", by using only that opponent's monster and this card you control. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can target 1 Fiend monster in your GY, except "Unchained Soul of Anguish"; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Unchained Soul of Anguish" once per turn.

action: Uses itself as a Link Material
Uses cards on the opponent's field as Link Materials
Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
